race.comment: FACTCHECK (8) clearly on top. He was a strong winner two back at Pakenham, charging home to just miss there last time as favourite. He can sit handy from the inside gate here and won't need to do anything more to be winning. BLISTERING (3) is in flying form having won her past two, a huge winner in BM62 company two back and too good again at Sandown Hillside last time. Have to respect in this sort of form. HOUSE OF LORDS (12) ran a solid race first up over 1400m and will be improved stepping up in trip, just not sure how far back she gets. SAVVIE BLANC (10) is racing consistently and should be thereabouts again. MERCHANT FLYER (5) presents third up off a good run at big odds last time, respecting.
